features: Fragrance lasts up to 70 days* neutralising bad odours (*Based on lowest setting using Air Wick device)
For use with Air Wick Freshmatic Autosprays
description: Product Description Our Air Wick Automatic Sprays are infused with natural essential oils and designed for 24/7 odour neutralisation for up to 70 days on lowest setting. Tackle pet odour removal and bathroom smells with our variety of fragrances to use around your home. Air Freshener. Ingredients Contains: Butane, Alcohol, Propane.

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: for freshening and deodorizing enclosed spaces such as rooms
